wiki.summary: "I Just Might" is a song by American singer Bruno Mars. It was released on January 9th 2026 as the lead single from his upcoming fourth album The Romantic, his first full-length solo release since 2017. The song was written by Mars, D'Mile, Philip Lawrence and Christopher Brody Brown, and produced by the former two. Read more on Last.fm.
